# GoodBoy donation application

GoodBoy is a localized donation flow for supporting the GoodBoy foundation and participating dog shelters in Slovakia.

## Donation flows

- [Slovak donation flow](https://marosko123.github.io/goodrequest-frontend-assignment/)
- [English donation flow](https://marosko123.github.io/goodrequest-frontend-assignment/en/)
- [Czech donation flow](https://marosko123.github.io/goodrequest-frontend-assignment/cz/)

## Information

- [About GoodBoy](https://marosko123.github.io/goodrequest-frontend-assignment/about/)
- [Contact](https://marosko123.github.io/goodrequest-frontend-assignment/contact/)
